Countdown (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $25,621,766Details
International Box Office $16,554,435
Worldwide Box Office $42,176,201
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a young nurse downloads an app that claims to predict exactly when a person is going to die, it tells her she only has three days to live. With time ticking away and death closing in, she must find a way to save her life before time runs out.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,865,082 (34.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.89 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$6,500,000 (worldwide box office is 6.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,675 opening theaters/2,675 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $33,453,663

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 25th, 2019 (Wide) by STX Entertainment
International Releases: October 25th, 2019 (Wide) (Middle East Region)
October 25th, 2019 (Wide) (Netherlands)
October 25th, 2019 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 25th, 2019 (Wide), released as Mirties APPS'AS (Lithuania)
October 25th, 2019 (Wide), released as Обратно броене (Bulgaria)
Video Release: January 7th, 2020 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for terror, violence, bloody images, suggestive material, language and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2598 (Cert #52409), 10/2/2019)
Running Time: 90 minutes
Plot point: Internet, Predicted Death
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Boies/Schiller, Two Grown Men Productions, Wrigley Pictures, STX Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When a young nurse downloads an app that claims to predict exactly when a person is going to die, it tells her she only has three days to live. With time ticking away and death closing in, she must find a way to save her life before time runs out.
